'''Tolmeatek''' was the highest [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] in the [[Tolmea Mountains|Tolmea mountain range]] on [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. "Tolmeatek" meant "untravelable" in [[X'Tingian]]. Its peak was covered in [[Water/Legends|snow]] and it was around 32 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] tall. The first people to reach the summit without [[Oxygen/Legends|oxygen]] supplies did so around [[120 BBY]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
